movie.title: Hero (2021) Dual Audio [Hindi ORG & Kannada] WEB-DL 200MB - 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDrive | BSub
movie.synopsis: Hero is a Kannada movie starring Rishab Shetty and Pramod Shetty in prominent roles. It is a drama directed by M. Bharath Raj with Rishab Shetty as producer, forming part of the crew.
